name: Tex-Mex Corn Macaroni
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Corn macaroni (found in natural food stores)
1/2 cup Chile peppers, green; peeled and chopped (frozen or canned)
1 cup Corn kernels, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in boiling water according to package directions.
2. In a large skillet, saute onion and garlic in oil over medium-high heat for about 5 minutes, or until tender.
3. Add both types of peppers and cook an additional 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in chili powder, oregano, tomatoes, and corn. Cook another 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Drain pasta and add to the vegetables in the pan. Cook over low heat until warm.
Total calories per serving: 310
Fat: 6 grams
